function.name: retrieve_document_by_id
function.description: Retrieve a document by its filename.
function.long_description: Fetches the full contents of a document from the documents folder using its filename as an identifier.
example_user_queries: Retrieve the document with ID DOC-1024.
Get the record for document_id KB-7781.
Open the document with ID HR-POL-17.
Look up the document whose ID is LOG-20260314-44.
Find the document with ID CASE-9182.
Fetch the file identified by document_id ARTICLE-88.
